# Portfolio Setup Instructions

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project with CV details
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Overview

This is a Next.js portfolio website for GitHub Pages, featuring:
- Professional CV/Resume display for Manasi Mahendra Jeste
- Automation Engineer & Data Analyst portfolio
- Master's in Embedded Systems Engineering focus
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- TypeScript for type safety
- Deployment-ready for GitHub Pages

## Key Information

**Name:** Manasi Mahendra Jeste  
**Title:** Automation Engineer | Data Analyst | ML & Embedded Systems  
**Focus Areas:** EV Charging Optimization, AI/ML, Embedded Systems, Renewable Energy

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- npm, yarn, or pnpm

## Development

Run the development server:
```bash
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) in your browser.

## Deployment

Deploy to GitHub Pages by configuring `next.config.js` with the appropriate settings.
